title: Better Fences
description: Bored of those vanilla fences? Try this pack!
body: Better Fences is a simple yet polished resource pack that enhances the appearance of Minecraft’s vanilla fences while staying fully faithful to the original style. Instead of replacing the game’s atmosphere with something completely new, this pack focuses on improving the small details that players often overlook. All fences textures have been redesigned to look cleaner and more natural, while still blending seamlessly with the default blocks. This makes fences feel more like a part of the world, whether you are decorating a cozy survival base, building a rustic barn, or designing a detailed medieval town. The goal of the pack is to provide subtle visual improvements that make builds feel more immersive without straying from the classic Minecraft charm.
